char_status: Director of 狩灵协会6科, Elder twin of 花坂 family
char_overview: Guardian of 天丛云剑, permitted to leave Fukuoka only when the sword must be drawn.
char_looks: 188cm. Short black hair Blue eyes. Black leather jacket with blue straps, white shirt, black trousers, combat boots. 天丛云剑, divine greatsword 1.4m; no 恶灵 has survived a direct attack. Sealed in special sheath, carries throwing knives for regular combat, usable as daggers in close quarters.
char_flaws: Accustomed to handling everything alone.; Checks sheath seal when idle; holding conversation with 天丛云剑 before drawing.
char_abilities: 花坂血统: No 灵力 or 灵视, can observe entities with the naked eye and strike them physically, peak human physical capabilities.
char_mission: Guard 天丛云剑, protect Fukuoka from 扭曲 as head of 狩灵协会6科.
char_origin: At eighteen, ended his father when 天丛云剑 consumed him, becoming its guardian and joining 狩灵协会1科. During the First 扭曲, drew the sword to slay a 灾厄级, forcibly given 色彩阶-靛蓝封禁 and transferred to lead the newly formed 狩灵协会6科.

char_relationships.花坂 枫: Father, trained under him, then ended his rampage, carrying that weight in every moment with 天丛云剑.
char_relationships.花坂 晴子: Mother, knew and forgave him, never spoke of that night again, which weighs on him more than any words could.
char_relationships.千乐: Younger twin brother, never asked about that night, suspects he knows more than he shows. Their silence is enough, respects the life he built away from the 狩灵协会.
char_relationships.百合子: Youngest sister, tried hardest to shield her from the truth, but she found it herself. She stopped asking about Father, and that cuts deeper than if she had kept asking.
